Rung.Comment: *************** Lot Traveler and machine reads traveler # ***************

Rung.Text: EQU(Pia.To_State,7010)EQU(Pia.From_State,7510)[XIC(debug_mode) XIC(debug_next_step) ,XIO(debug_mode) ][ONS(ons_closeassy_01) [CPS(k_blank_data,Pia.TO_PIA.Data,1) ,CPS(k_blank_data,Pia.FROM_PIA.Data,1) ,CPS(k_blank_string_array[0],Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Numbers[0],20) ,MOV(0,Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Qty) ,OTU(data_chk_dn) OTU(trav_chk_dn) ] ,JSR(subxx_DataChk,2,k_blank_data,Pia.TO_PIA.Data) ,JSR(subxx_TravChk,4,k_blank_string_array,Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Numbers,0,Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Qty) ,XIC(data_chk_dn) XIC(data_chk_ok) XIC(trav_chk_dn) XIC(trav_chk_ok) MOV(7020,Pia.To_State) ,OTU(debug_next_step) ];

Rung.Comment: *************** Lot Traveler and PIA generates traveler # ***************

Rung.Text: EQU(Pia.To_State,7160)[XIC(debug_mode) XIC(debug_next_step) ,XIO(debug_mode) ][ONS(ons_closeassy_16) CPS(k_blank_string_array[0],Pia.FROM_PIA.Trav_Numbers[0],20) ,EQU(Pia.From_State,7660) [ONS(ons_closeassy_04) [OTU(data_chk_dn) OTU(trav_chk_dn) ,CPS(Pia.FROM_PIA.Trav_Numbers[0],Pia.Machine.Trav_Numbers[0],20) ,MOV(Pia.FROM_PIA.Trav_Qty,Pia.Machine.Trav_Qty) ,CPS(k_blank_data,Pia.TO_PIA.Data,1) ,CPS(k_blank_data,Pia.FROM_PIA.Data,1) ,MOV(0,Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Qty) ,CPS(k_blank_string_array[0],Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Numbers[0],20) ,MOV(0,Pia.FROM_PIA.Trav_Qty) ,CPS(k_blank_string_array[0],Pia.FROM_PIA.Trav_Numbers[0],20) ] ,JSR(subxx_DataChk,2,k_blank_data,Pia.TO_PIA.Data) ,JSR(subxx_TravChk,4,k_blank_string_array,Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Numbers,0,Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Qty) ,XIC(data_chk_dn) XIC(data_chk_ok) XIC(trav_chk_dn) XIC(trav_chk_ok) [CPS(k_blank_string_array[0],Pia.FROM_PIA.Trav_Numbers[0],20) ,MOV(7170,Pia.To_State) ] ] ,OTU(debug_next_step) ];

EQU(Pia.To_State,7170)EQU(Pia.From_State,7660)[XIC(debug_mode) XIC(debug_next_step) ,XIO(debug_mode) ][[ONS(ons_closeassy_05) [OTU(data_chk_dn) OTU(trav_chk_dn) ,CPS(Pia.Machine.Data_Trace,Pia.TO_PIA.Data,1) ,CPS(Pia.Machine.Trav_Numbers[0],Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Numbers[0],20) ,MOV(Pia.Machine.Trav_Qty,Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Qty) ] ,JSR(subxx_DataChk,2,Pia.Machine.Data_Trace,Pia.TO_PIA.Data) ,JSR(subxx_TravChk,4,Pia.Machine.Trav_Numbers,Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Numbers,Pia.Machine.Trav_Qty,Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Qty) ,XIC(data_chk_dn) XIC(data_chk_ok) XIC(trav_chk_dn) XIC(trav_chk_ok) MOV(7180,Pia.To_State) ] ,OTU(debug_next_step) ];

EQU(Pia.To_State,7190)[XIC(debug_mode) XIC(debug_next_step) ,XIO(debug_mode) ]EQU(Pia.From_State,7690)[ONS(ons_closeassy_06) OTU(data_chk_dn) OTU(trav_chk_dn) ,JSR(subxx_DataChk,2,Pia.Machine.Data_Trace,Pia.FROM_PIA.Data) ,JSR(subxx_TravChk,4,Pia.FROM_PIA.Trav_Numbers,Pia.Machine.Trav_Numbers,Pia.FROM_PIA.Trav_Qty,Pia.Machine.Trav_Qty) ,XIC(data_chk_dn) XIC(trav_chk_dn) [XIC(data_chk_ok) XIC(trav_chk_ok) MOV(7200,Pia.To_State) ,[XIO(data_chk_ok) ,XIO(trav_chk_ok) ] [MOV(Pia.To_State,Pia.Machine.Alarm_Mc_State) ,MOV(Pia.From_State,Pia.Machine.Alarm_Pia_State) ,MOV(20,Pia.Machine.Alarm_Message_Trigger) ,COP(k_pia_alarm_messages[Pia.Machine.Alarm_Message_Trigger],Pia.Machine.Alarm_Message,1) ,MOV(7210,Pia.To_State) ] ] ]OTU(debug_next_step);

Rung.Comment: *************** Serial Traveler and MC reads traveler # ***************

Rung.Text: EQU(Pia.To_State,7340)EQU(Pia.From_State,7840)[XIC(debug_mode) XIC(debug_next_step) ,XIO(debug_mode) ][ONS(ons_closeassy_07) [OTU(data_chk_dn) OTU(trav_chk_dn) ,CPS(k_blank_data,Pia.TO_PIA.Data,1) ,MOV(0,Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Qty) ,CPS(k_blank_data,Pia.FROM_PIA.Data,1) ,CPS(k_blank_string_array[0],Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Numbers[0],20) ] ,JSR(subxx_DataChk,2,k_blank_data,Pia.TO_PIA.Data) ,JSR(subxx_TravChk,4,k_blank_string_array,Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Numbers,0,Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Qty) ,XIC(data_chk_dn) XIC(data_chk_ok) XIC(trav_chk_dn) XIC(trav_chk_ok) MOV(7350,Pia.To_State) ,OTU(debug_next_step) ];

EQU(Pia.To_State,7350)EQU(Pia.From_State,7840)[XIC(debug_mode) XIC(debug_next_step) ,XIO(debug_mode) ][[ONS(ons_closeassy_08) [OTU(data_chk_dn) OTU(trav_chk_dn) ,CPS(Pia.Machine.Data_Trace,Pia.TO_PIA.Data,1) ,CPS(Pia.Machine.Trav_Numbers[0],Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Numbers[0],20) ,MOV(Pia.Machine.Trav_Qty,Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Qty) ] ,JSR(subxx_DataChk,2,Pia.Machine.Data_Trace,Pia.TO_PIA.Data) ,JSR(subxx_TravChk,4,Pia.Machine.Trav_Numbers,Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Numbers,Pia.Machine.Trav_Qty,Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Qty) ,XIC(data_chk_dn) XIC(data_chk_ok) XIC(trav_chk_dn) XIC(trav_chk_ok) MOV(7360,Pia.To_State) ] ,OTU(debug_next_step) ];

EQU(Pia.To_State,7370)[XIC(debug_mode) XIC(debug_next_step) ,XIO(debug_mode) ]EQU(Pia.From_State,7870)[ONS(ons_closeassy_09) OTU(data_chk_dn) OTU(trav_chk_dn) ,JSR(subxx_DataChk,2,Pia.Machine.Data_Trace,Pia.FROM_PIA.Data) ,JSR(subxx_TravChk,4,Pia.Machine.Trav_Numbers,Pia.FROM_PIA.Trav_Numbers,Pia.Machine.Trav_Qty,Pia.FROM_PIA.Trav_Qty) ,XIC(data_chk_dn) XIC(trav_chk_dn) [XIC(data_chk_ok) XIC(trav_chk_ok) MOV(7380,Pia.To_State) ,[XIO(data_chk_ok) ,XIO(trav_chk_ok) ] [MOV(Pia.To_State,Pia.Machine.Alarm_Mc_State) ,MOV(Pia.From_State,Pia.Machine.Alarm_Pia_State) ,MOV(23,Pia.Machine.Alarm_Message_Trigger) ,COP(k_pia_alarm_messages[Pia.Machine.Alarm_Message_Trigger],Pia.Machine.Alarm_Message,1) ,MOV(7390,Pia.To_State) ] ] ]OTU(debug_next_step);

Rung.Comment: *************** Serial Traveler and PIA generates traveler # ***************

Rung.Text: EQU(Pia.To_State,7490)[XIC(debug_mode) XIC(debug_next_step) ,XIO(debug_mode) ][ONS(ons_closeassy_17) [CPS(k_blank_string_array[0],Pia.FROM_PIA.Trav_Numbers[0],20) ,MOV(0,Pia.FROM_PIA.Trav_Qty) ] ,EQU(Pia.From_State,7990) [ONS(ons_closeassy_10) [OTU(data_chk_dn) OTU(trav_chk_dn) ,CPS(Pia.FROM_PIA.Trav_Numbers[0],Pia.Machine.Trav_Numbers[0],20) ,MOV(Pia.FROM_PIA.Trav_Qty,Pia.Machine.Trav_Qty) ,CPS(k_blank_data,Pia.TO_PIA.Data,1) ,CPS(k_blank_data,Pia.FROM_PIA.Data,1) ,CPS(k_blank_string_array[0],Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Numbers[0],20) ,MOV(0,Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Qty) ,CPS(k_blank_string_array[0],Pia.FROM_PIA.Trav_Numbers[0],20) ,MOV(0,Pia.FROM_PIA.Trav_Qty) ] ,JSR(subxx_DataChk,2,k_blank_data,Pia.TO_PIA.Data) ,JSR(subxx_TravChk,4,k_blank_string_array,Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Numbers,0,Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Qty) ,XIC(data_chk_dn) XIC(data_chk_ok) XIC(trav_chk_dn) XIC(trav_chk_ok) MOV(7510,Pia.To_State) ,OTU(debug_next_step) ] ];

EQU(Pia.To_State,7510)EQU(Pia.From_State,7990)[XIC(debug_mode) XIC(debug_next_step) ,XIO(debug_mode) ][ONS(ons_closeassy_11) [OTU(data_chk_dn) OTU(trav_chk_dn) ,CPS(Pia.Machine.Data_Trace,Pia.TO_PIA.Data,1) ,CPS(Pia.Machine.Trav_Numbers[0],Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Numbers[0],20) ,MOV(Pia.Machine.Trav_Qty,Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Qty) ] ,JSR(subxx_DataChk,2,Pia.Machine.Data_Trace,Pia.TO_PIA.Data) ,JSR(subxx_TravChk,4,Pia.Machine.Trav_Numbers,Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Numbers,Pia.Machine.Trav_Qty,Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Qty) ,XIC(data_chk_dn) XIC(data_chk_ok) XIC(trav_chk_dn) XIC(trav_chk_ok) MOV(7530,Pia.To_State) ,OTU(debug_next_step) ];

EQU(Pia.To_State,7590)[XIC(debug_mode) XIC(debug_next_step) ,XIO(debug_mode) ]EQU(Pia.From_State,8510)[ONS(ons_closeassy_12) OTU(data_chk_dn) OTU(trav_chk_dn) ,JSR(subxx_DataChk,2,Pia.Machine.Data_Trace,Pia.FROM_PIA.Data) ,JSR(subxx_TravChk,4,Pia.Machine.Trav_Numbers,Pia.FROM_PIA.Trav_Numbers,Pia.Machine.Trav_Qty,Pia.FROM_PIA.Trav_Qty) ,XIC(data_chk_dn) XIC(trav_chk_dn) [XIC(data_chk_ok) XIC(trav_chk_ok) MOV(7900,Pia.To_State) ,[XIO(data_chk_ok) ,XIO(trav_chk_ok) ] [MOV(Pia.To_State,Pia.Machine.Alarm_Mc_State) ,MOV(Pia.From_State,Pia.Machine.Alarm_Pia_State) ,MOV(25,Pia.Machine.Alarm_Message_Trigger) ,COP(k_pia_alarm_messages[Pia.Machine.Alarm_Message_Trigger],Pia.Machine.Alarm_Message,1) ,MOV(8000,Pia.To_State) ] ] ]OTU(debug_next_step);

Rung.Comment: *************** Lot Traveler and PIA generates traveler # and PIA requests the event ***************

Rung.Text: EQU(Pia.To_State,8160)[XIC(debug_mode) XIC(debug_next_step) ,XIO(debug_mode) ][ONS(ons_closeassy_14) [OTU(data_chk_dn) OTU(trav_chk_dn) ,CPS(Pia.Machine.Data_Trace,Pia.TO_PIA.Data,1) ,CPS(Pia.Machine.Trav_Numbers[0],Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Numbers[0],20) ,MOV(Pia.Machine.Trav_Qty,Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Qty) ] ,JSR(subxx_DataChk,2,Pia.Machine.Data_Trace,Pia.TO_PIA.Data) ,JSR(subxx_TravChk,4,Pia.Machine.Trav_Numbers,Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Numbers,Pia.Machine.Trav_Qty,Pia.TO_PIA.Trav_Qty) ,XIC(data_chk_dn) XIC(data_chk_ok) XIC(trav_chk_dn) XIC(trav_chk_ok) MOV(8170,Pia.To_State) ,OTU(debug_next_step) ];

EQU(Pia.To_State,8180)[XIC(debug_mode) XIC(debug_next_step) ,XIO(debug_mode) ]EQU(Pia.From_State,8690)[ONS(ons_closeassy_15) OTU(data_chk_dn) OTU(trav_chk_dn) ,JSR(subxx_DataChk,2,Pia.Machine.Data_Trace,Pia.FROM_PIA.Data) ,JSR(subxx_TravChk,4,Pia.Machine.Trav_Numbers,Pia.FROM_PIA.Trav_Numbers,Pia.Machine.Trav_Qty,Pia.FROM_PIA.Trav_Qty) ,XIC(data_chk_dn) XIC(trav_chk_dn) [XIC(data_chk_ok) XIC(trav_chk_ok) MOV(8190,Pia.To_State) ,[XIO(data_chk_ok) ,XIO(trav_chk_ok) ] [MOV(Pia.To_State,Pia.Machine.Alarm_Mc_State) ,MOV(Pia.From_State,Pia.Machine.Alarm_Pia_State) ,MOV(28,Pia.Machine.Alarm_Message_Trigger) ,COP(k_pia_alarm_messages[Pia.Machine.Alarm_Message_Trigger],Pia.Machine.Alarm_Message,1) ,MOV(8200,Pia.To_State) ] ] ]OTU(debug_next_step);
